sources.title: Google Developer Advocate Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: L3 (SWE II equiv): base $145K, stock $37.4K/yr, bonus $5.7K, total $188K — updated 7/12/2026

sources.note: US Amazon Developer Advocate range $165K-$229K, median $190K total comp

sources.note: Engineering-only data ($254K-$1.23M); no DevRel/Developer Advocate title present

sources.note: Company-wide range $199K-$785K+, no role-level breakdown for DevRel found

sources.note: General engineering TC bands only ($249K-$1.28M), no DevRel role data

sources.title: Datadog job postings (via search aggregation)
sources.note: Postings cite $120,000-$176,000 and $136,000-$174,000 + equity bands for Developer Advocate roles
